title: Skyline Residency
short_description: A 12-storey modern residential complex with 96 premium apartments.
full_description: Skyline Residency is a 12-storey residential tower featuring 96 premium 2 and 3 BHK apartments. The project focused on earthquake-resistant structural design, energy-efficient glazing, and a rooftop community garden. Our team handled everything from foundation to interior finishing, delivering the project two weeks ahead of schedule.

title: Greenfield Corporate Park
short_description: A LEED-certified 5-building office campus for 3,000+ employees.
full_description: Greenfield Corporate Park is a five-building commercial campus designed for sustainability and employee wellbeing. The project includes solar rooftop panels, rainwater harvesting, open-plan collaborative floors, and a central amphitheater. We managed civil construction, MEP works, and landscaping across a 6-acre site.

title: Riverside Bridge Renovation
short_description: Structural reinforcement and widening of a 40-year-old river bridge.
full_description: This civil infrastructure project involved reinforcing the aging structural columns of a 40-year-old bridge, widening it from 2 lanes to 4, and adding pedestrian walkways with LED safety lighting. Work was carried out in phases to keep the bridge partially operational throughout construction, minimizing disruption to daily commuters.

title: Hilltop Villas
short_description: 8 luxury hillside villas with panoramic valley views.
full_description: Hilltop Villas is a boutique development of 8 private villas built into a hillside, each designed to maximize valley views while withstanding monsoon runoff. Features include natural stone facades, infinity-edge pools, and terraced landscaping to prevent soil erosion. Every villa was custom-designed per client preference.

title: Metro Junction Mall
short_description: A 4-storey retail and entertainment complex spanning 350,000 sq ft.
full_description: Metro Junction Mall is a large-scale retail and entertainment destination featuring over 150 stores, a multiplex cinema, and a rooftop food court. The build required close coordination with structural, electrical, HVAC, and fire safety consultants. We delivered a fully compliant, energy-efficient commercial space on time and within budget.
